## Type
<!-- Tick all that apply -->
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:mock` passes
- [ ] i18n keys added to **both** `zh-tw.ts` and `en-us.ts` (if UI text changed)
- [ ] No hardcoded colours (use `var(--el-color-*)`)
- [ ] No inline `style="..."` attributes
- [ ] Screenshots attached (if UI changed)
